<span style="color:blue"># --- End of included input --- </span></span><br/><div class="tooltip" style="color:green">DUMPGRID<div class="right">Output the function on the grid to a file with the PLUMED grid format. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_d_u_m_p_g_r_i_d.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">GRID<div class="right">the grid you would like to print (can also use ARG for specifying what is being printed)<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh350-1000">hh350-1000</b> <div class="tooltip">FILE<div class="right"> the file on which to write the grid<i></i></div></div>=histo350-1000 <div class="tooltip">STRIDE<div class="right"> the frequency with which the grid should be output to the file<i></i></div></div>=10000 <div class="tooltip">FMT<div class="right">the format that should be used to output real numbers<i></i></div></div>=%16.10f

... HISTOGRAM
</span><span id="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datdefhh350-4000_long" style="display:none;"><div class="tooltip" style="color:green">HISTOGRAM<div class="right">Accumulate the average probability density along a few CVs from a trajectory. This action is <a class="toggler" href='javascript:;' onclick='toggleDisplay("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh350-4000");'>a shortcut</a> and uses the <a class="toggler" href='javascript:;' onclick='toggleDisplay("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datdefhh350-4000");'>defaults shown here</a>. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_h_i_s_t_o_g_r_a_m.html">More details</a><i></i></div></div> ...
  <div class="tooltip">ARG<div class="right">the quantity that is being averaged<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datrefcv">refcv.morethan</b>
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_MIN<div class="right"> the lower bounds for the grid<i></i></div></div>=-0.5
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_MAX<div class="right"> the upper bounds for the grid<i></i></div></div>=250.5
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_BIN<div class="right">the number of bins for the grid<i></i></div></div>=1000
  <div class="tooltip">BANDWIDTH<div class="right">the bandwidths for kernel density esimtation<i></i></div></div>=1
  <div class="tooltip">LOGWEIGHTS<div class="right">the logarithm of the quantity to use as the weights when calculating averages<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datweights">weights</b>,<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datweights350-4000">weights350-4000</b>
  <div class="tooltip">NORMALIZATION<div class="right"> This controls how the data is normalized it can be set equal to true, false or ndata<i></i></div></div>=true
  <div class="tooltip">LABEL<div class="right">a label for the action so that its output can be referenced in the input to other actions<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh350-4000" onclick='showPath("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dat","data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh350-4000","data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh350-4000_shortcut","green")'>hh350-4000</b>
  <div class="tooltip">CLEAR<div class="right"> the frequency with whihc to clear the data that is being averaged<i></i></div></div>=10000

... HISTOGRAM

<br/><b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datweights350-5000" onclick='showPath("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dat","data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datweights350-5000","data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datweights350-5000","black")'>weights350-5000</b><span style="display:none;" id="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datweights350-5000">The REWEIGHT_TEMP_PRESS action with label <b>weights350-5000</b> calculates the following quantities:<table  align="center" frame="void" width="95%" cellpadding="5%"><tr><td width="5%"><b> Quantity </b>  </td><td width="5%"><b> Type </b>  </td><td><b> Description </b> </td></tr><tr><td width="5%">weights350-5000</td><td width="5%"><font color="black">scalar</font></td><td>the weight to use for this frame to determine its contribution at a different temperature/pressure</td></tr></table></span>: <div class="tooltip" style="color:green">REWEIGHT_TEMP_PRESS<div class="right">Calculate weights for ensemble averages at temperatures and/or pressures different than those used in your original simulation. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_r_e_w_e_i_g_h_t__t_e_m_p__p_r_e_s_s.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">TEMP<div class="right">the system temperature<i></i></div></div>=400 <div class="tooltip">PRESSURE<div class="right">The system pressure<i></i></div></div>=301.10704285 <div class="tooltip">REWEIGHT_TEMP<div class="right">Reweighting temperature<i></i></div></div>=350.0 <div class="tooltip">REWEIGHT_PRESSURE<div class="right">Reweighting pressure<i></i></div></div>=301.10704285 <div class="tooltip">ENERGY<div class="right">Energy<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datrenergy">renergy</b> <div class="tooltip">VOLUME<div class="right">Volume<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datvol">vol</b>

<span id="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datff350-5000_short"><b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datff350-5000" onclick='showPath("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dat","data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datff350-5000","data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datff350-5000_shortcut","green")'>ff350-5000</b><span style="display:none;" id="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datff350-5000_shortcut">The CONVERT_TO_FES action with label <b>ff350-5000</b> calculates the following quantities:<table  align="center" frame="void" width="95%" cellpadding="5%"><tr><td width="5%"><b> Quantity </b>  </td><td width="5%"><b> Type </b>  </td><td><b> Description </b> </td></tr><tr><td width="5%">ff350-5000</td><td width="5%"><font color="green">grid</font></td><td>the free energy surface</td></tr></table></span>: <div class="tooltip" style="color:green">CONVERT_TO_FES<div class="right">Convert a histogram to a free energy surface. <span style="color:blue"># --- End of included input --- </span></span><br/><div class="tooltip" style="color:green">DUMPGRID<div class="right">Output the function on the grid to a file with the PLUMED grid format. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_d_u_m_p_g_r_i_d.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">GRID<div class="right">the grid you would like to print (can also use ARG for specifying what is being printed)<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh350-6000">hh350-6000</b> <div class="tooltip">FILE<div class="right"> the file on which to write the grid<i></i></div></div>=histo350-6000 <div class="tooltip">STRIDE<div class="right"> the frequency with which the grid should be output to the file<i></i></div></div>=10000 <div class="tooltip">FMT<div class="right">the format that should be used to output real numbers<i></i></div></div>=%16.10f

  <div class="tooltip">CLEAR<div class="right"> the frequency with whihc to clear the data that is being averaged<i></i></div></div>=10000

</span><span id="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datdefhh350-9000_long" style="display:none;"><div class="tooltip" style="color:green">HISTOGRAM<div class="right">Accumulate the average probability density along a few CVs from a trajectory. This action is <a class="toggler" href='javascript:;' onclick='toggleDisplay("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh350-9000");'>a shortcut</a> and uses the <a class="toggler" href='javascript:;' onclick='toggleDisplay("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datdefhh350-9000");'>defaults shown here</a>. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_h_i_s_t_o_g_r_a_m.html">More details</a><i></i></div></div> ...
  <div class="tooltip">ARG<div class="right">the quantity that is being averaged<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datrefcv">refcv.morethan</b>
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_MIN<div class="right"> the lower bounds for the grid<i></i></div></div>=-0.5
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_MAX<div class="right"> the upper bounds for the grid<i></i></div></div>=250.5
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_BIN<div class="right">the number of bins for the grid<i></i></div></div>=1000
  <div class="tooltip">BANDWIDTH<div class="right">the bandwidths for kernel density esimtation<i></i></div></div>=1
  <div class="tooltip">LOGWEIGHTS<div class="right">the logarithm of the quantity to use as the weights when calculating averages<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datweights">weights</b>,<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datweights350-9000">weights350-9000</b>
  <div class="tooltip">NORMALIZATION<div class="right"> This controls how the data is normalized it can be set equal to true, false or ndata<i></i></div></div>=true

<span style="color:blue"># --- End of included input --- </span></span><br/><div class="tooltip" style="color:green">DUMPGRID<div class="right">Output the function on the grid to a file with the PLUMED grid format. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_d_u_m_p_g_r_i_d.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">GRID<div class="right">the grid you would like to print (can also use ARG for specifying what is being printed)<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh360-0">hh360-0</b> <div class="tooltip">FILE<div class="right"> the file on which to write the grid<i></i></div></div>=histo360-0 <div class="tooltip">STRIDE<div class="right"> the frequency with which the grid should be output to the file<i></i></div></div>=10000 <div class="tooltip">FMT<div class="right">the format that should be used to output real numbers<i></i></div></div>=%16.10f

  <div class="tooltip">ARG<div class="right">the quantity that is being averaged<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datrefcv">refcv.morethan</b>

  <div class="tooltip">LABEL<div class="right">a label for the action so that its output can be referenced in the input to other actions<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh360-3000" onclick='showPath("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dat","data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh360-3000","data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh360-3000_shortcut","green")'>hh360-3000</b><span style="display:none;" id="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh360-3000_shortcut">The HISTOGRAM action with label <b>hh360-3000</b> calculates the following quantities:<table  align="center" frame="void" width="95%" cellpadding="5%"><tr><td width="5%"><b> Quantity </b>  </td><td width="5%"><b> Type </b>  </td><td><b> Description </b> </td></tr><tr><td width="5%">hh360-3000</td><td width="5%"><font color="green">grid</font></td><td>the estimate of the histogram as a function of the argument that was obtained</td></tr></table></span>
  <div class="tooltip">CLEAR<div class="right"> the frequency with whihc to clear the data that is being averaged<i></i></div></div>=10000
... HISTOGRAM
</span><span id="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datdefhh360-3000_long" style="display:none;"><div class="tooltip" style="color:green">HISTOGRAM<div class="right">Accumulate the average probability density along a few CVs from a trajectory. This action is <a class="toggler" href='javascript:;' onclick='toggleDisplay("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh360-3000");'>a shortcut</a> and uses the <a class="toggler" href='javascript:;' onclick='toggleDisplay("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datdefhh360-3000");'>defaults shown here</a>. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_h_i_s_t_o_g_r_a_m.html">More details</a><i></i></div></div> ...
  <div class="tooltip">ARG<div class="right">the quantity that is being averaged<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datrefcv">refcv.morethan</b>
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_MIN<div class="right"> the lower bounds for the grid<i></i></div></div>=-0.5
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_MAX<div class="right"> the upper bounds for the grid<i></i></div></div>=250.5
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_BIN<div class="right">the number of bins for the grid<i></i></div></div>=1000
  <div class="tooltip">BANDWIDTH<div class="right">the bandwidths for kernel density esimtation<i></i></div></div>=1
  <div class="tooltip">LOGWEIGHTS<div class="right">the logarithm of the quantity to use as the weights when calculating averages<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datweights">weights</b>,<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datweights360-3000">weights360-3000</b>
  <div class="tooltip">NORMALIZATION<div class="right"> This controls how the data is normalized it can be set equal to true, false or ndata<i></i></div></div>=true
  <div class="tooltip">LABEL<div class="right">a label for the action so that its output can be referenced in the input to other actions<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh360-3000" onclick='showPath("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dat","data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh360-3000","data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh360-3000_shortcut","green")'>hh360-3000</b>
  <div class="tooltip">CLEAR<div class="right"> the frequency with whihc to clear the data that is being averaged<i></i></div></div>=10000

<span style="color:blue"># --- End of included input --- </span></span><br/><div class="tooltip" style="color:green">DUMPGRID<div class="right">Output the function on the grid to a file with the PLUMED grid format. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_d_u_m_p_g_r_i_d.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">GRID<div class="right">the grid you would like to print (can also use ARG for specifying what is being printed)<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh360-5000">hh360-5000</b> <div class="tooltip">FILE<div class="right"> the file on which to write the grid<i></i></div></div>=histo360-5000 <div class="tooltip">STRIDE<div class="right"> the frequency with which the grid should be output to the file<i></i></div></div>=10000 <div class="tooltip">FMT<div class="right">the format that should be used to output real numbers<i></i></div></div>=%16.10f

</span><span id="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datdefhh360-8000_long" style="display:none;"><div class="tooltip" style="color:green">HISTOGRAM<div class="right">Accumulate the average probability density along a few CVs from a trajectory. This action is <a class="toggler" href='javascript:;' onclick='toggleDisplay("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh360-8000");'>a shortcut</a> and uses the <a class="toggler" href='javascript:;' onclick='toggleDisplay("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datdefhh360-8000");'>defaults shown here</a>. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_h_i_s_t_o_g_r_a_m.html">More details</a><i></i></div></div> ...
  <div class="tooltip">ARG<div class="right">the quantity that is being averaged<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datrefcv">refcv.morethan</b>
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_MIN<div class="right"> the lower bounds for the grid<i></i></div></div>=-0.5
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_MAX<div class="right"> the upper bounds for the grid<i></i></div></div>=250.5
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_BIN<div class="right">the number of bins for the grid<i></i></div></div>=1000

  <div class="tooltip">NORMALIZATION<div class="right"> This controls how the data is normalized it can be set equal to true, false or ndata<i></i></div></div>=true

<span style="color:blue"># --- End of included input --- </span></span><br/><div class="tooltip" style="color:green">DUMPGRID<div class="right">Output the function on the grid to a file with the PLUMED grid format. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_d_u_m_p_g_r_i_d.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">GRID<div class="right">the grid you would like to print (can also use ARG for specifying what is being printed)<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh360-10000">hh360-10000</b> <div class="tooltip">FILE<div class="right"> the file on which to write the grid<i></i></div></div>=histo360-10000 <div class="tooltip">STRIDE<div class="right"> the frequency with which the grid should be output to the file<i></i></div></div>=10000 <div class="tooltip">FMT<div class="right">the format that should be used to output real numbers<i></i></div></div>=%16.10f

</span><span id="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datdefhh370-2000_long" style="display:none;"><div class="tooltip" style="color:green">HISTOGRAM<div class="right">Accumulate the average probability density along a few CVs from a trajectory. This action is <a class="toggler" href='javascript:;' onclick='toggleDisplay("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh370-2000");'>a shortcut</a> and uses the <a class="toggler" href='javascript:;' onclick='toggleDisplay("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datdefhh370-2000");'>defaults shown here</a>. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_h_i_s_t_o_g_r_a_m.html">More details</a><i></i></div></div> ...
  <div class="tooltip">ARG<div class="right">the quantity that is being averaged<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datrefcv">refcv.morethan</b>
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_MIN<div class="right"> the lower bounds for the grid<i></i></div></div>=-0.5
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_MAX<div class="right"> the upper bounds for the grid<i></i></div></div>=250.5
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_BIN<div class="right">the number of bins for the grid<i></i></div></div>=1000
  <div class="tooltip">BANDWIDTH<div class="right">the bandwidths for kernel density esimtation<i></i></div></div>=1
  <div class="tooltip">LOGWEIGHTS<div class="right">the logarithm of the quantity to use as the weights when calculating averages<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datweights">weights</b>,<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datweights370-2000">weights370-2000</b>
  <div class="tooltip">NORMALIZATION<div class="right"> This controls how the data is normalized it can be set equal to true, false or ndata<i></i></div></div>=true
  <div class="tooltip">LABEL<div class="right">a label for the action so that its output can be referenced in the input to other actions<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh370-2000" onclick='showPath("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dat","data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh370-2000","data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh370-2000_shortcut","green")'>hh370-2000</b>
  <div class="tooltip">CLEAR<div class="right"> the frequency with whihc to clear the data that is being averaged<i></i></div></div>=10000

This action is <a class="toggler" href='javascript:;' onclick='toggleDisplay("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh370-7000");'>a shortcut</a> and uses the <a class="toggler" href='javascript:;' onclick='toggleDisplay("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datdefhh370-7000");'>defaults shown here</a>. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_h_i_s_t_o_g_r_a_m.html">More details</a><i></i></div></div> ...
  <div class="tooltip">ARG<div class="right">the quantity that is being averaged<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datrefcv">refcv.morethan</b>

<span style="color:blue"># --- End of included input --- </span></span><br/><div class="tooltip" style="color:green">DUMPGRID<div class="right">Output the function on the grid to a file with the PLUMED grid format. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_d_u_m_p_g_r_i_d.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">GRID<div class="right">the grid you would like to print (can also use ARG for specifying what is being printed)<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh380-2000">hh380-2000</b> <div class="tooltip">FILE<div class="right"> the file on which to write the grid<i></i></div></div>=histo380-2000 <div class="tooltip">STRIDE<div class="right"> the frequency with which the grid should be output to the file<i></i></div></div>=10000 <div class="tooltip">FMT<div class="right">the format that should be used to output real numbers<i></i></div></div>=%16.10f

This action is <a class="toggler" href='javascript:;' onclick='toggleDisplay("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh390-3000");'>a shortcut</a> and uses the <a class="toggler" href='javascript:;' onclick='toggleDisplay("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datdefhh390-3000");'>defaults shown here</a>. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_h_i_s_t_o_g_r_a_m.html">More details</a><i></i></div></div> ...
  <div class="tooltip">ARG<div class="right">the quantity that is being averaged<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datrefcv">refcv.morethan</b>
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_MIN<div class="right"> the lower bounds for the grid<i></i></div></div>=-0.5

<span style="color:blue"># --- End of included input --- </span></span><br/><div class="tooltip" style="color:green">DUMPGRID<div class="right">Output the function on the grid to a file with the PLUMED grid format. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_d_u_m_p_g_r_i_d.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">GRID<div class="right">the grid you would like to print (can also use ARG for specifying what is being printed)<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh390-10000">hh390-10000</b> <div class="tooltip">FILE<div class="right"> the file on which to write the grid<i></i></div></div>=histo390-10000 <div class="tooltip">STRIDE<div class="right"> the frequency with which the grid should be output to the file<i></i></div></div>=10000 <div class="tooltip">FMT<div class="right">the format that should be used to output real numbers<i></i></div></div>=%16.10f

</span><span id="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datdefhh400-2000_long" style="display:none;"><div class="tooltip" style="color:green">HISTOGRAM<div class="right">Accumulate the average probability density along a few CVs from a trajectory. This action is <a class="toggler" href='javascript:;' onclick='toggleDisplay("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh400-2000");'>a shortcut</a> and uses the <a class="toggler" href='javascript:;' onclick='toggleDisplay("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datdefhh400-2000");'>defaults shown here</a>. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_h_i_s_t_o_g_r_a_m.html">More details</a><i></i></div></div> ...
  <div class="tooltip">ARG<div class="right">the quantity that is being averaged<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datrefcv">refcv.morethan</b>
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_MIN<div class="right"> the lower bounds for the grid<i></i></div></div>=-0.5
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_MAX<div class="right"> the upper bounds for the grid<i></i></div></div>=250.5
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_BIN<div class="right">the number of bins for the grid<i></i></div></div>=1000
  <div class="tooltip">BANDWIDTH<div class="right">the bandwidths for kernel density esimtation<i></i></div></div>=1
  <div class="tooltip">LOGWEIGHTS<div class="right">the logarithm of the quantity to use as the weights when calculating averages<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datweights">weights</b>,<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datweights400-2000">weights400-2000</b>
  <div class="tooltip">NORMALIZATION<div class="right"> This controls how the data is normalized it can be set equal to true, false or ndata<i></i></div></div>=true
  <div class="tooltip">LABEL<div class="right">a label for the action so that its output can be referenced in the input to other actions<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh400-2000" onclick='showPath("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dat","data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh400-2000","data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh400-2000_shortcut","green")'>hh400-2000</b>
  <div class="tooltip">CLEAR<div class="right"> the frequency with whihc to clear the data that is being averaged<i></i></div></div>=10000

... HISTOGRAM

<span style="color:blue"># --- End of included input --- </span></span><br/><div class="tooltip" style="color:green">DUMPGRID<div class="right">Output the function on the grid to a file with the PLUMED grid format. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_d_u_m_p_g_r_i_d.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">GRID<div class="right">the grid you would like to print (can also use ARG for specifying what is being printed)<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh400-4000">hh400-4000</b> <div class="tooltip">FILE<div class="right"> the file on which to write the grid<i></i></div></div>=histo400-4000 <div class="tooltip">STRIDE<div class="right"> the frequency with which the grid should be output to the file<i></i></div></div>=10000 <div class="tooltip">FMT<div class="right">the format that should be used to output real numbers<i></i></div></div>=%16.10f

This action is <a class="toggler" href='javascript:;' onclick='toggleDisplay("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datff400-4000");'>a shortcut</a>. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_c_o_n_v_e_r_t__t_o__f_e_s.html">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">GRID<div class="right">the histogram that you would like to convert into a free energy surface (old syntax)<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh400-4000">hh400-4000</b> <div class="tooltip">TEMP<div class="right">the temperature at which you are operating<i></i></div></div>=400.0

</span><span id="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datdefhh400-7000_long" style="display:none;"><div class="tooltip" style="color:green">HISTOGRAM<div class="right">Accumulate the average probability density along a few CVs from a trajectory. This action is <a class="toggler" href='javascript:;' onclick='toggleDisplay("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh400-7000");'>a shortcut</a> and uses the <a class="toggler" href='javascript:;' onclick='toggleDisplay("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datdefhh400-7000");'>defaults shown here</a>. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_h_i_s_t_o_g_r_a_m.html">More details</a><i></i></div></div> ...
  <div class="tooltip">ARG<div class="right">the quantity that is being averaged<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datrefcv">refcv.morethan</b>
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_MIN<div class="right"> the lower bounds for the grid<i></i></div></div>=-0.5
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_MAX<div class="right"> the upper bounds for the grid<i></i></div></div>=250.5
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_BIN<div class="right">the number of bins for the grid<i></i></div></div>=1000
  <div class="tooltip">BANDWIDTH<div class="right">the bandwidths for kernel density esimtation<i></i></div></div>=1
  <div class="tooltip">LOGWEIGHTS<div class="right">the logarithm of the quantity to use as the weights when calculating averages<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datweights">weights</b>,<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datweights400-7000">weights400-7000</b>
  <div class="tooltip">NORMALIZATION<div class="right"> This controls how the data is normalized it can be set equal to true, false or ndata<i></i></div></div>=true
  <div class="tooltip">LABEL<div class="right">a label for the action so that its output can be referenced in the input to other actions<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh400-7000" onclick='showPath("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dat","data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh400-7000","data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh400-7000_shortcut","green")'>hh400-7000</b>
  <div class="tooltip">CLEAR<div class="right"> the frequency with whihc to clear the data that is being averaged<i></i></div></div>=10000

  <div class="tooltip">LOGWEIGHTS<div class="right">the logarithm of the quantity to use as the weights when calculating averages<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datweights">weights</b>,<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datweights410-1000">weights410-1000</b>

<span style="color:blue"># --- End of included input --- </span></span><br/><div class="tooltip" style="color:green">DUMPGRID<div class="right">Output the function on the grid to a file with the PLUMED grid format. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_d_u_m_p_g_r_i_d.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">GRID<div class="right">the grid you would like to print (can also use ARG for specifying what is being printed)<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh410-2000">hh410-2000</b> <div class="tooltip">FILE<div class="right"> the file on which to write the grid<i></i></div></div>=histo410-2000 <div class="tooltip">STRIDE<div class="right"> the frequency with which the grid should be output to the file<i></i></div></div>=10000 <div class="tooltip">FMT<div class="right">the format that should be used to output real numbers<i></i></div></div>=%16.10f

This action is <a class="toggler" href='javascript:;' onclick='toggleDisplay("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datff410-2000");'>a shortcut</a>. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_c_o_n_v_e_r_t__t_o__f_e_s.html">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">GRID<div class="right">the histogram that you would like to convert into a free energy surface (old syntax)<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh410-2000">hh410-2000</b> <div class="tooltip">TEMP<div class="right">the temperature at which you are operating<i></i></div></div>=410.0

</span><span id="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datdefhh410-5000_long" style="display:none;"><div class="tooltip" style="color:green">HISTOGRAM<div class="right">Accumulate the average probability density along a few CVs from a trajectory. This action is <a class="toggler" href='javascript:;' onclick='toggleDisplay("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh410-5000");'>a shortcut</a> and uses the <a class="toggler" href='javascript:;' onclick='toggleDisplay("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datdefhh410-5000");'>defaults shown here</a>. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_h_i_s_t_o_g_r_a_m.html">More details</a><i></i></div></div> ...
  <div class="tooltip">ARG<div class="right">the quantity that is being averaged<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datrefcv">refcv.morethan</b>
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_MIN<div class="right"> the lower bounds for the grid<i></i></div></div>=-0.5

</span><span id="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datdefhh420-3000_long" style="display:none;"><div class="tooltip" style="color:green">HISTOGRAM<div class="right">Accumulate the average probability density along a few CVs from a trajectory. This action is <a class="toggler" href='javascript:;' onclick='toggleDisplay("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh420-3000");'>a shortcut</a> and uses the <a class="toggler" href='javascript:;' onclick='toggleDisplay("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datdefhh420-3000");'>defaults shown here</a>. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_h_i_s_t_o_g_r_a_m.html">More details</a><i></i></div></div> ...
  <div class="tooltip">ARG<div class="right">the quantity that is being averaged<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datrefcv">refcv.morethan</b>
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_MIN<div class="right"> the lower bounds for the grid<i></i></div></div>=-0.5
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_MAX<div class="right"> the upper bounds for the grid<i></i></div></div>=250.5
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_BIN<div class="right">the number of bins for the grid<i></i></div></div>=1000

  <div class="tooltip">LOGWEIGHTS<div class="right">the logarithm of the quantity to use as the weights when calculating averages<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datweights">weights</b>,<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datweights420-3000">weights420-3000</b>

  <div class="tooltip">CLEAR<div class="right"> the frequency with whihc to clear the data that is being averaged<i></i></div></div>=10000

<span style="color:blue"># --- End of included input --- </span></span><br/><div class="tooltip" style="color:green">DUMPGRID<div class="right">Output the function on the grid to a file with the PLUMED grid format. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_d_u_m_p_g_r_i_d.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">GRID<div class="right">the grid you would like to print (can also use ARG for specifying what is being printed)<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh420-5000">hh420-5000</b> <div class="tooltip">FILE<div class="right"> the file on which to write the grid<i></i></div></div>=histo420-5000 <div class="tooltip">STRIDE<div class="right"> the frequency with which the grid should be output to the file<i></i></div></div>=10000 <div class="tooltip">FMT<div class="right">the format that should be used to output real numbers<i></i></div></div>=%16.10f

<span style="color:blue"># --- End of included input --- </span></span><br/><div class="tooltip" style="color:green">DUMPGRID<div class="right">Output the function on the grid to a file with the PLUMED grid format. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_d_u_m_p_g_r_i_d.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">GRID<div class="right">the grid you would like to print (can also use ARG for specifying what is being printed)<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh420-10000">hh420-10000</b> <div class="tooltip">FILE<div class="right"> the file on which to write the grid<i></i></div></div>=histo420-10000 <div class="tooltip">STRIDE<div class="right"> the frequency with which the grid should be output to the file<i></i></div></div>=10000 <div class="tooltip">FMT<div class="right">the format that should be used to output real numbers<i></i></div></div>=%16.10f

  <div class="tooltip">CLEAR<div class="right"> the frequency with whihc to clear the data that is being averaged<i></i></div></div>=10000
... HISTOGRAM
</span><span id="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datdefhh430-2000_long" style="display:none;"><div class="tooltip" style="color:green">HISTOGRAM<div class="right">Accumulate the average probability density along a few CVs from a trajectory. This action is <a class="toggler" href='javascript:;' onclick='toggleDisplay("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh430-2000");'>a shortcut</a> and uses the <a class="toggler" href='javascript:;' onclick='toggleDisplay("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datdefhh430-2000");'>defaults shown here</a>. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_h_i_s_t_o_g_r_a_m.html">More details</a><i></i></div></div> ...
  <div class="tooltip">ARG<div class="right">the quantity that is being averaged<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datrefcv">refcv.morethan</b>
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_MIN<div class="right"> the lower bounds for the grid<i></i></div></div>=-0.5
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_MAX<div class="right"> the upper bounds for the grid<i></i></div></div>=250.5
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_BIN<div class="right">the number of bins for the grid<i></i></div></div>=1000
  <div class="tooltip">BANDWIDTH<div class="right">the bandwidths for kernel density esimtation<i></i></div></div>=1
  <div class="tooltip">LOGWEIGHTS<div class="right">the logarithm of the quantity to use as the weights when calculating averages<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datweights">weights</b>,<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datweights430-2000">weights430-2000</b>
  <div class="tooltip">NORMALIZATION<div class="right"> This controls how the data is normalized it can be set equal to true, false or ndata<i></i></div></div>=true
  <div class="tooltip">LABEL<div class="right">a label for the action so that its output can be referenced in the input to other actions<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh430-2000" onclick='showPath("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dat","data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh430-2000","data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh430-2000_shortcut","green")'>hh430-2000</b>
  <div class="tooltip">CLEAR<div class="right"> the frequency with whihc to clear the data that is being averaged<i></i></div></div>=10000
 <div class="tooltip">STRIDE<div class="right"> the frequency with which to store data for averaging<i></i></div></div>=1
... HISTOGRAM

<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh430-2000_nsum" onclick='showPath("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dat","data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh430-2000_nsum","data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh430-2000_nsum","black")'>hh430-2000_nsum</b><span style="display:none;" id="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh430-2000_nsum">The ACCUMULATE action with label <b>hh430-2000_nsum</b> calculates the following quantities:<table  align="center" frame="void" width="95%" cellpadding="5%"><tr><td width="5%"><b> Quantity </b>  </td><td width="5%"><b> Type </b>  </td><td><b> Description </b> </td></tr><tr><td width="5%">hh430-2000_nsum</td><td width="5%"><font color="black">scalar</font></td><td>a sum calculated from the time series of the input quantity</td></tr></table></span>: <div class="tooltip" style="color:green">ACCUMULATE<div class="right">Sum the elements of this value over the course of the trajectory <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_a_c_c_u_m_u_l_a_t_e.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">ARG<div class="right">the input for this action is the scalar output from one or more other actions<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh430-2000_weight">hh430-2000_weight</b> <div class="tooltip">STRIDE<div class="right"> the frequency with which the data should be collected and added to the quantity being averaged<i></i></div></div>=1 <div class="tooltip">CLEAR<div class="right"> the frequency with which to clear all the accumulated data<i></i></div></div>=10000 
<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh430-2000" onclick='showPath("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dat","data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh430-2000","data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh430-2000","green")'>hh430-2000</b><span style="display:none;" id="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh430-2000">The CUSTOM action with label <b>hh430-2000</b> calculates the following quantities:<table  align="center" frame="void" width="95%" cellpadding="5%"><tr><td width="5%"><b> Quantity </b>  </td><td width="5%"><b> Type </b>  </td><td><b> Description </b> </td></tr><tr><td width="5%">hh430-2000</td><td width="5%"><font color="green">grid</font></td><td>the grid obtained by doing an element-wise application of an arbitrary function to the input grid</td></tr></table></span>: <div class="tooltip" style="color:green">CUSTOM<div class="right">Calculate a combination of variables using a custom expression. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_c_u_s_t_o_m.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">ARG<div class="right">the input to this function<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh430-2000_u">hh430-2000_u</b>,<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh430-2000_nsum">hh430-2000_nsum</b> <div class="tooltip">FUNC<div class="right">the function you wish to evaluate<i></i></div></div>=x/y <div class="tooltip">PERIODIC<div class="right">if the output of your function is periodic then you should specify the periodicity of the function<i></i></div></div>=NO

<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datff430-2000" onclick='showPath("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dat","data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datff430-2000","data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datff430-2000","green")'>ff430-2000</b><span style="display:none;" id="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datff430-2000">The CUSTOM action with label <b>ff430-2000</b> calculates the following quantities:<table  align="center" frame="void" width="95%" cellpadding="5%"><tr><td width="5%"><b> Quantity </b>  </td><td width="5%"><b> Type </b>  </td><td><b> Description </b> </td></tr><tr><td width="5%">ff430-2000</td><td width="5%"><font color="green">grid</font></td><td>the grid obtained by doing an element-wise application of an arbitrary function to the input grid</td></tr></table></span>: <div class="tooltip" style="color:green">CUSTOM<div class="right">Calculate a combination of variables using a custom expression. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_c_u_s_t_o_m.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">ARG<div class="right">the input to this function<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh430-2000">hh430-2000</b> <div class="tooltip">FUNC<div class="right">the function you wish to evaluate<i></i></div></div>=-3.57522*log(x <div class="tooltip">PERIODIC<div class="right">if the output of your function is periodic then you should specify the periodicity of the function<i></i></div></div>=NO 
<span style="color:blue"># --- End of included input --- </span></span><div class="tooltip" style="color:green">DUMPGRID<div class="right">Output the function on the grid to a file with the PLUMED grid format. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_d_u_m_p_g_r_i_d.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">GRID<div class="right">the grid you would like to print (can also use ARG for specifying what is being printed)<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datff430-2000">ff430-2000</b> <div class="tooltip">FILE<div class="right"> the file on which to write the grid<i></i></div></div>=fes430-2000 <div class="tooltip">STRIDE<div class="right"> the frequency with which the grid should be output to the file<i></i></div></div>=10000 <div class="tooltip">FMT<div class="right">the format that should be used to output real numbers<i></i></div></div>=%16.10f

<span style="color:blue"># --- End of included input --- </span></span><br/><div class="tooltip" style="color:green">DUMPGRID<div class="right">Output the function on the grid to a file with the PLUMED grid format. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_d_u_m_p_g_r_i_d.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">GRID<div class="right">the grid you would like to print (can also use ARG for specifying what is being printed)<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh430-4000">hh430-4000</b> <div class="tooltip">FILE<div class="right"> the file on which to write the grid<i></i></div></div>=histo430-4000 <div class="tooltip">STRIDE<div class="right"> the frequency with which the grid should be output to the file<i></i></div></div>=10000 <div class="tooltip">FMT<div class="right">the format that should be used to output real numbers<i></i></div></div>=%16.10f

This action is <a class="toggler" href='javascript:;' onclick='toggleDisplay("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datff430-4000");'>a shortcut</a>. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_c_o_n_v_e_r_t__t_o__f_e_s.html">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">GRID<div class="right">the histogram that you would like to convert into a free energy surface (old syntax)<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh430-4000">hh430-4000</b> <div class="tooltip">TEMP<div class="right">the temperature at which you are operating<i></i></div></div>=430.0

</span><span id="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datdefhh430-7000_long" style="display:none;"><div class="tooltip" style="color:green">HISTOGRAM<div class="right">Accumulate the average probability density along a few CVs from a trajectory. This action is <a class="toggler" href='javascript:;' onclick='toggleDisplay("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh430-7000");'>a shortcut</a> and uses the <a class="toggler" href='javascript:;' onclick='toggleDisplay("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datdefhh430-7000");'>defaults shown here</a>. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_h_i_s_t_o_g_r_a_m.html">More details</a><i></i></div></div> ...
  <div class="tooltip">ARG<div class="right">the quantity that is being averaged<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datrefcv">refcv.morethan</b>
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_MIN<div class="right"> the lower bounds for the grid<i></i></div></div>=-0.5
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_MAX<div class="right"> the upper bounds for the grid<i></i></div></div>=250.5
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_BIN<div class="right">the number of bins for the grid<i></i></div></div>=1000
  <div class="tooltip">BANDWIDTH<div class="right">the bandwidths for kernel density esimtation<i></i></div></div>=1
  <div class="tooltip">LOGWEIGHTS<div class="right">the logarithm of the quantity to use as the weights when calculating averages<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datweights">weights</b>,<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datweights430-7000">weights430-7000</b>
  <div class="tooltip">NORMALIZATION<div class="right"> This controls how the data is normalized it can be set equal to true, false or ndata<i></i></div></div>=true
  <div class="tooltip">LABEL<div class="right">a label for the action so that its output can be referenced in the input to other actions<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh430-7000" onclick='showPath("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dat","data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh430-7000","data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh430-7000_shortcut","green")'>hh430-7000</b>
  <div class="tooltip">CLEAR<div class="right"> the frequency with whihc to clear the data that is being averaged<i></i></div></div>=10000

<span style="color:blue"># --- End of included input --- </span></span><br/><div class="tooltip" style="color:green">DUMPGRID<div class="right">Output the function on the grid to a file with the PLUMED grid format. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_d_u_m_p_g_r_i_d.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">GRID<div class="right">the grid you would like to print (can also use ARG for specifying what is being printed)<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh440-2000">hh440-2000</b> <div class="tooltip">FILE<div class="right"> the file on which to write the grid<i></i></div></div>=histo440-2000 <div class="tooltip">STRIDE<div class="right"> the frequency with which the grid should be output to the file<i></i></div></div>=10000 <div class="tooltip">FMT<div class="right">the format that should be used to output real numbers<i></i></div></div>=%16.10f

  <div class="tooltip">ARG<div class="right">the quantity that is being averaged<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datrefcv">refcv.morethan</b>
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_MIN<div class="right"> the lower bounds for the grid<i></i></div></div>=-0.5

</span><span id="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datdefhh450-3000_long" style="display:none;"><div class="tooltip" style="color:green">HISTOGRAM<div class="right">Accumulate the average probability density along a few CVs from a trajectory. This action is <a class="toggler" href='javascript:;' onclick='toggleDisplay("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh450-3000");'>a shortcut</a> and uses the <a class="toggler" href='javascript:;' onclick='toggleDisplay("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datdefhh450-3000");'>defaults shown here</a>. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_h_i_s_t_o_g_r_a_m.html">More details</a><i></i></div></div> ...
  <div class="tooltip">ARG<div class="right">the quantity that is being averaged<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datrefcv">refcv.morethan</b>
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_MIN<div class="right"> the lower bounds for the grid<i></i></div></div>=-0.5
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_MAX<div class="right"> the upper bounds for the grid<i></i></div></div>=250.5
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_BIN<div class="right">the number of bins for the grid<i></i></div></div>=1000

  <div class="tooltip">LOGWEIGHTS<div class="right">the logarithm of the quantity to use as the weights when calculating averages<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datweights">weights</b>,<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datweights450-3000">weights450-3000</b>

  <div class="tooltip">CLEAR<div class="right"> the frequency with whihc to clear the data that is being averaged<i></i></div></div>=10000

<span style="color:blue"># --- End of included input --- </span></span><br/><div class="tooltip" style="color:green">DUMPGRID<div class="right">Output the function on the grid to a file with the PLUMED grid format. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_d_u_m_p_g_r_i_d.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">GRID<div class="right">the grid you would like to print (can also use ARG for specifying what is being printed)<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh450-5000">hh450-5000</b> <div class="tooltip">FILE<div class="right"> the file on which to write the grid<i></i></div></div>=histo450-5000 <div class="tooltip">STRIDE<div class="right"> the frequency with which the grid should be output to the file<i></i></div></div>=10000 <div class="tooltip">FMT<div class="right">the format that should be used to output real numbers<i></i></div></div>=%16.10f

  <div class="tooltip">ARG<div class="right">the quantity that is being averaged<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datrefcv">refcv.morethan</b>
  <div class="tooltip">GRID_MIN<div class="right"> the lower bounds for the grid<i></i></div></div>=-0.5

<span style="color:blue"># --- End of included input --- </span></span><br/><div class="tooltip" style="color:green">DUMPGRID<div class="right">Output the function on the grid to a file with the PLUMED grid format. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_d_u_m_p_g_r_i_d.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">GRID<div class="right">the grid you would like to print (can also use ARG for specifying what is being printed)<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh450-10000">hh450-10000</b> <div class="tooltip">FILE<div class="right"> the file on which to write the grid<i></i></div></div>=histo450-10000 <div class="tooltip">STRIDE<div class="right"> the frequency with which the grid should be output to the file<i></i></div></div>=10000 <div class="tooltip">FMT<div class="right">the format that should be used to output real numbers<i></i></div></div>=%16.10f
<span id="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datff450-10000_short"><b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datff450-10000" onclick='showPath("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dat","data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datff450-10000","data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datff450-10000_shortcut","green")'>ff450-10000</b><span style="display:none;" id="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datff450-10000_shortcut">The CONVERT_TO_FES action with label <b>ff450-10000</b> calculates the following quantities:<table  align="center" frame="void" width="95%" cellpadding="5%"><tr><td width="5%"><b> Quantity </b>  </td><td width="5%"><b> Type </b>  </td><td><b> Description </b> </td></tr><tr><td width="5%">ff450-10000</td><td width="5%"><font color="green">grid</font></td><td>the free energy surface</td></tr></table></span>: <div class="tooltip" style="color:green">CONVERT_TO_FES<div class="right">Convert a histogram to a free energy surface. This action is <a class="toggler" href='javascript:;' onclick='toggleDisplay("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datff450-10000");'>a shortcut</a>. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_c_o_n_v_e_r_t__t_o__f_e_s.html">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">GRID<div class="right">the histogram that you would like to convert into a free energy surface (old syntax)<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh450-10000">hh450-10000</b> <div class="tooltip">TEMP<div class="right">the temperature at which you are operating<i></i></div></div>=450.0

<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datff450-10000" onclick='showPath("data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dat","data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datff450-10000","data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datff450-10000","green")'>ff450-10000</b><span style="display:none;" id="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.datff450-10000">The CUSTOM action with label <b>ff450-10000</b> calculates the following quantities:<table  align="center" frame="void" width="95%" cellpadding="5%"><tr><td width="5%"><b> Quantity </b>  </td><td width="5%"><b> Type </b>  </td><td><b> Description </b> </td></tr><tr><td width="5%">ff450-10000</td><td width="5%"><font color="green">grid</font></td><td>the grid obtained by doing an element-wise application of an arbitrary function to the input grid</td></tr></table></span>: <div class="tooltip" style="color:green">CUSTOM<div class="right">Calculate a combination of variables using a custom expression. <a href="https://www.plumed.org/doc-master/user-doc/html/_c_u_s_t_o_m.html" style="color:green">More details</a><i></i></div></div> <div class="tooltip">ARG<div class="right">the input to this function<i></i></div></div>=<b name="data/Na/03_MultithermalMultibaric/Reweight/plumed.dathh450-10000">hh450-10000</b> <div class="tooltip">FUNC<div class="right">the function you wish to evaluate<i></i></div></div>=-3.74151*log(x <div class="tooltip">PERIODIC<div class="right">if the output of your function is periodic then you should specify the periodicity of the function<i></i></div></div>=NO
